behavior: Creates org + admin user atomically. Input: { full_name, org_name, email, password }. Returns { success: true } or { error: FieldErrors }. Checks for duplicate email before insert.
Admin-only. Inserts invitation row then sends email via Resend. On email failure, compensating DELETE. Input: { email, role }. Returns { success: true } or { error }.
Public (no auth required). Validates token not expired and not already accepted. Creates user + marks invitation accepted in a transaction. Input: { token, full_name, password }.
Admin-only. Guards against demoting the last admin. Input: { userId, role }. Returns { success: true } or { error }.
Admin-only. Cannot remove self. Guards against removing the last admin. Input: { userId }. Returns { success: true } or { error }.
